title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates building a Jira adapter for Archon, an AI coding automation framework. The adapter enables workflows where Jira tickets trigger Archon to fix bugs, create pull requests, and post results back to the ticket.
